content: One co-authored paper has been submitted and under review.
Presented my work at SIGMOD 2025 in Berlin, Germany! An incredible experience connecting with so many brilliant minds!
One Demo paper on time-series symbolic approximation is accepted to VLDB 2025!
Two co-authored papers on time-series analysis are accepted to SIGMOD 2025!
Two survey papers on time-series analysis are posted to arXiv (under submission).
One paper on automatic speech recognition has been accepted to Computer Speech & Language (CSL)!
Starting my PhD life at The Ohio State University!
Graduate from Carnegie Mellon University with an M.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering. Cheers!
Welcome to my new academic homepage!
